description.p: While wearing this cloak, you have resistance to cold damage.
Enable this option to add the Polar Bear Cloak to this character's equipment. While the cloak is worn, it grants resistance to cold damage.

setters.set: You gain the Polar Bear Cloak, which grants resistance to cold damage while worn.

description.p: Twice per short rest, when you cast a spell of 1st level or higher using a spell slot, you can increase that spell's effective level by 1. You must have and expend a spell slot of the spell's original level; for all effects that depend on the spell slot's level, treat the spell as if it had been cast using a spell slot one level higher.

sheet.description: When you cast a spell of 1st level or higher, expend a spell slot of its original level to treat it as cast using a spell slot one level higher.

description.p: Enable this option to add the Deep Thought trait to this character. It can be used twice per short rest.

setters.set: You gain Deep Thought, usable twice per short rest.
